mapper.select: SELECT umSw.SW_NM AS recoverySwNM ,umSwFile.SW_FILE_VER AS recoverySwVer ,recoverySw.STM_FIR_REG_DATE ,(SELECT user_nm FROM ad_user_mst WHERE user_id = recoverySw.STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID) STM_FIR_REG_USER_NM ,recoverySw.STM_LAST_UPD_DATE ,(SELECT user_nm FROM ad_user_mst WHERE user_id = recoverySw.STM_LAST_UPD_USER_ID) STM_LAST_UPD_USER_NM FROM UM_URG_RCVR_SW_MST recoverySw ,UM_SW_MST umSw ,UM_SW_FILE_DTL umSwFile WHERE recoverySw.SW_ID = umSw.SW_ID AND recoverySw.SW_FILE_ID = umSwFile.SW_FILE_ID AND recoverySw.modl_cd = #{modlCd}

SELECT a.modl_cd ,b.model_name modlNm ,a.modl_poc_cd FROM dm_dvc_modl_mst a,stb_model b WHERE a.modl_cd = b.model_code AND substr(a.modl_cd,0,2) not in ('11','12') AND a.use_yn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(b.model_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{modlNm} || '%')
ORDER BY b.model_name ASC

SELECT dmDvice.modl_cd ,stbModel.model_name modlNm ,recoverySwNM ,recoverySwVer , ( SELECT count(*) FROM UM_UPD_PLAN_STBL_VER_MAP planMap WHERE planMap.MODL_CD = dmDvice.MODL_CD AND planMap.REQ_SVC = 'authbtv' ) mappingCnt -------------------- ,recoverySwId ,recoverySwFileId ,recoverySwFileVer ,etc ,renew_fg_cd ,edge_refresh_yn --,case edge_refresh_yn when 'Y' then 'N' else 'Y' end edge_refresh_yn ,sw_file_sz ,sw_upload_path_nm ,ver_file_sz ,ver_upload_path FROM dm_dvc_modl_mst dmDvice LEFT JOIN ( SELECT recoverySw.MODL_CD ,umSw.SW_NM AS recoverySwNM ,umSwFile.SW_FILE_VER AS recoverySwVer ---------------------------- ,recoverySw.sw_id AS recoverySwId ,recoverySw.sw_file_id AS recoverySwFileId ,recoverySw.sw_file_ver AS recoverySwFileVer ,recoverySw.etc ,recoverySw.edge_refresh_yn ,recoverySw.renew_fg_cd ,recoverySw.sw_file_sz ,recoverySw.sw_upload_path_nm ,recoverySw.ver_file_sz ,recoverySw.ver_upload_path FROM UM_URG_RCVR_SW_MST recoverySw ,UM_SW_MST umSw ,UM_SW_FILE_DTL umSwFile ,(SELECT MODL_NM, max(STM_LAST_UPD_DATE) max_date FROM UM_URG_RCVR_SW_MST GROUP BY modl_nm) lastSw WHERE recoverySw.SW_ID = umSw.SW_ID AND recoverySw.SW_FILE_ID = umSwFile.SW_FILE_ID AND recoverySw.modl_nm = lastSw.modl_nm AND recoverySw.stm_last_upd_date=lastSw.max_date ) recoveryT ON dmDvice.MODL_CD = recoveryT.MODL_CD ,stb_model stbModel WHERE dmDvice.modl_cd = stbModel.model_code AND substr(dmDvice.modl_cd,0,2) not in ('11','12') AND dmDvice.use_yn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(stbModel.model_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{modlNm} || '%')
ORDER BY stbModel.model_name ASC
select distinct(acc_modl_fg_nm) from dm_acc_modl_mst order by acc_modl_fg_nm

SELECT acc_modl_id ,acc_modl_nm FROM dm_acc_modl_mst WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
AND UPPER(acc_modl_nm) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{txtModelNm} || '%')
ORDER BY acc_modl_nm ASC
select count(acc_distb_id) from UM_UPD_ACC_DISTB_MST where ACC_MODL_ID = #{accModlId}
select count(plan_id) from UM_UPD_PLAN_MST where modl_cd = #{accModlId}
